pi_items.source: task description and verifier.py enforce this exact dashboard name
task description and verifier.py enforce these exact graph titles
task description, verifier.py, and feed_real_data.py script which maps ec2_network_in.csv to this metric
task description prompt explicitly sets this role
inferred from the Network Operations Center (NOC) context in the prompt
export_result.sh outputs to this file and verifier.py reads from it

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on real-world time-series data from the Numenta Anomaly Benchmark (NAB), specifically the ec2_network_in.csv dataset, which is mapped to the target metric 'servers.ec2_instance_1.network.bytes_in'. The verifier strictly requires a dashboard named 'Network Bandwidth Monitor' containing two graphs: 'Inbound Traffic Rate' and 'Smoothed Traffic Rate'. The first graph must use a rate function, a scale factor of 0.000008, and an alias function. The second graph must apply the same pipeline wrapped in a movingAverage with a window of 5.
